```{=html}
<aside class="side-panel notation-sidebar">
<details>
<summary>Notation</summary>
<p><a href="phase-a.qmd#setup-and-notation">The model</a> §1 covers the
shared symbols. Simulator-specific additions:</p>
<dl>
  <dt><code>k</code></dt>
  <dd>Pre-purchased inventory (kVCM).</dd>

  <dt><code>C<sub>basis</sub></code></dt>
  <dd>Sunk cost of that inventory (USD).</dd>

  <dt><code>τ = min(1, k / (N·P))</code></dt>
  <dd>Fraction of horizon the inventory covers.</dd>

  <dt><code>k<sub>left</sub> = max(0, k − N·P)</code></dt>
  <dd>Leftover tokens at horizon when over-hedged (kVCM).</dd>

  <dt><code>J<sub>τ</sub> = ∫<sub>τT</sub><sup>T</sup> S<sub>t</sub> dt</code></dt>
  <dd>Tail integral over the uncovered window ((USD/kVCM)·year).</dd>

  <dt><code>Π<sub>cust</sub> = Q·N − C<sub>basis</sub> − P·λ·J<sub>τ</sub> + k<sub>left</sub>·S<sub>T</sub></code></dt>
  <dd>Custom-inventory principal P&amp;L (USD).</dd>
</dl>
</details>
</aside>
```
